# Test Review ‚Äî `lib/features/speech/ui/widgets/recording/` + `test/features/speech/ui/widgets/recording/`

**Scope:** Six widget files: `AnalogVuMeter` (246 lines), `AudioRecordingIndicator` (105 lines), `AudioRecordingModal` (453 lines), `AudioRecordingOrb` (229 lines), `VuMeterPainter` (447 lines), `VuMeterConstants` (19 lines), plus the `vu_meter_painter_test.dart` (459 lines).  
**Generated by automated test-quality review (static analysis).**

---

## File size / split opportunities

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_test.dart` (1137 lines) and `audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart` (913 lines) both test `AudioRecordingModal` from the same source file. Per AGENTS.md: "One test file per source file." Merge them. The `coverage_test.dart` file was clearly created to add more tests without splitting; merge it back into `audio_recording_modal_test.dart`. After merging, if the combined file is too large, split on *subgroups* (e.g. `audio_recording_modal_interaction_test.dart` for tap/button tests) rather than on coverage percentage.

- [ ] **[MED]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_indicator_timer_text_test.dart` (58 lines) tests a sub-widget of the same source file as `audio_recording_indicator_test.dart`. Fold it into the indicator test; 479 + 58 = 537 lines is acceptable.

- [ ] **[LOW]** `lib/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal.dart` (453 lines) is near threshold. If post-merge test file is very large, consider extracting `AudioRecordingModalContent` into its own source file `audio_recording_modal_content.dart` as a natural split seam.

## Test quality improvements

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart:41‚Äì50` ‚Äî Defines `MockAudioRecorderRepository`, `MockPlayer`, `MockPlayerState`, `MockPlayerStream`, `FakePlayable` inline. All five already exist in `test/mocks/mocks.dart`. Same duplication appears in `audio_recording_modal_test.dart:42‚Äì51`. Remove all inline definitions and import from the centralized file. **RESOLVED:** `audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart` no longer exists (its tests live in `audio_recording_modal_test.dart`); the one remaining inline mock there (`MockPlayerState`) moved to `test/mocks/mocks.dart`, and the other four were already imported centrally.

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart:334‚Äì860` ‚Äî 14 calls to `pumpAndSettle()` without any settled animation justification. The widgets in this modal (checkboxes, stop/record buttons) are not animated in a way that requires `pumpAndSettle`. Each call has a 10-second default timeout; if any provider or widget enters an unresolvable loading state, the test silently hangs for 10 seconds. Replace with `tester.pump()` + `tester.pump()` (for Riverpod async resolution) as done correctly in `audio_recording_modal_test.dart`. **RESOLVED:** the coverage file is gone; the 14 settles that migrated into `audio_recording_modal_test.dart` are bounded pumps (pump + 300ms) now.

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/analog_vu_meter_test.dart:229` and `269` ‚Äî `pumpAndSettle(const Duration(seconds: 2))` ‚Äî explicitly passes a 2-second interval to `pumpAndSettle`. Per test README, never pass a duration > 1 second. Both occurrences are in animation-completion tests ("allows all animations to complete fully", "handles rapid decibel changes"). Replace with `tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500))` in a loop or a single `tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500))` after the last widget rebuild ‚Äî the VU meter's `AnimationController` drives at most a few hundred milliseconds. **RESOLVED:** both 2-second settles are single `pump(500ms)` calls and the file's remaining plain settles are bounded pumps.

- [ ] **[MED]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_indicator_test.dart:25` ‚Äî Defines `MockAudioRecorderRepository` (also inline, duplicate of mocks.dart line 501) and `MockEntryController`. `MockAudioRecorderRepository` should be imported from `test/mocks/mocks.dart`.

- [ ] **[MED]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_test.dart:352‚Äì1137` ‚Äî 14 tests build ad-hoc `ProviderScope + MaterialApp + Scaffold + localization` wrappers individually via `pumpWidget(createTestWidget(...))`. The file already has a `createTestWidget` helper (line ~300), but it is defined per-test scope rather than as a file-level helper with parametrized overrides. The `_pumpModalContent` helper in `audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart` is the right pattern ‚Äî adopt it in the main test file on merge.

- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_orb_test.dart:12‚Äì36` ‚Äî The `AudioRecordingSignalLevel.fromDbfs(...)` tests use 8 hand-rolled fixture values. These are good concrete examples, but no test verifies the monotonicity invariant (`dbfs1 < dbfs2 ‚Üí normalized1 ‚â§ normalized2`). This is a Glados candidate (see below).

## Generative (Glados) testing opportunities

- [ ] **[MED]** `AudioRecordingSignalLevel.fromDbfs(double dBFS)` in `lib/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_orb.dart` ‚Äî pure math function mapping dBFS to a normalized `[0, 1]` signal level with an emphasis curve. Invariants for a Glados test:
  - `result.normalized ‚àà [0.0, 1.0]` for any finite or non-finite input.
  - Monotonicity: if `a < b` and both finite, then `fromDbfs(a).normalized ‚â§ fromDbfs(b).normalized`.
  - `isClipping` implies `normalized ‚âà 1.0`.
  Generate with `any.double` (including `nan`, `+inf`, `-inf`) filtered to avoid Dart floating-point special cases if needed.

- [ ] **[LOW]** `VuMeterPainter` paint logic in `lib/‚Ä¶/recording/vu_meter_painter.dart` ‚Äî The `shouldRepaint` logic is already tested. The `paint` method's geometric calculations (tick positions, needle angle from 0.0‚Äì1.0 value) are deterministic pure functions of `value` and `size`. A Glados property over `(value: 0..1, size: 50..500)` could verify: no `RangeError`, `drawCircleCount ‚â• 0`, tick layout is within bounds. The existing `_CountingCanvas` infrastructure already supports this.

## Coverage / missing-behavior gaps

- [ ] **[MED]** `lib/‚Ä¶/recording/vu_meter_constants.dart` (19 lines) ‚Äî No test file. Constants (`vuMeterTickCount`, angle constants, etc.) are used by `VuMeterPainter`. While constants themselves need no test, if any formula built from them is tested, test the formula with the actual constant values to catch accidental changes. Consider at minimum a `expect(VuMeterConstants.something, expectedValue)` smoke test in `vu_meter_painter_test.dart`.

- [ ] **[MED]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_test.dart` and `coverage_test.dart` ‚Äî The `AudioRecordingModal.show()` static method is tested in the coverage file (via `_pumpShowModalTrigger`) but the dismiss/close path (tapping outside the bottom sheet) is not verified. The test calls `pumpAndSettle()` after showing the modal but does not assert that the modal can be dismissed.

- [ ] **[LOW]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_indicator_test.dart` ‚Äî Confirm that the timer text sub-widget state (elapsed recording time) is tested for the case where recording has been going on for >59 seconds (minute rollover in `formatElapsed`).

## Test execution speed opportunities

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_coverage_test.dart` ‚Äî 14 `pumpAndSettle()` calls at 10-second default timeouts each could block the suite for up to 140 seconds if any provider fails to resolve. Replace all with `tester.pump()` + `tester.pump()`. This is the single largest theoretical risk in the UI subdir. **RESOLVED:** same fix as the settle item above ‚Äî no unbounded settles remain in the modal test.

- [x] **[HIGH]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/analog_vu_meter_test.dart:229, 269` ‚Äî Two `pumpAndSettle(const Duration(seconds: 2))` calls. If the underlying animation controller triggers periodic ticks or the `pumpAndSettle` loop keeps re-rendering, these can add 4+ real seconds per test run. Replace with `tester.pump(const Duration(milliseconds: 500))`. **RESOLVED:** same fix as the vu-meter settle item above.

- [ ] **[MED]** `test/‚Ä¶/recording/audio_recording_modal_test.dart` and `coverage_test.dart` ‚Äî Both create a fresh `StreamController<Duration>` (position, buffer, completed) in each test's `setUp` and close it in `tearDown`. With ~30 tests combined, this is 90 stream controller lifecycles per suite run. Acceptable but worth noting; consider using `Stream.value(Duration.zero)` stubs in tests that don't exercise stream updates.

---

## Summary

- `audio_recording_modal` is tested across **two files** (1137 + 913 = 2050 total lines) violating the one-test-per-source-file rule ‚Äî merge is the top priority.
- 14 `pumpAndSettle()` calls in `coverage_test.dart` and 2 calls with `Duration(seconds: 2)` in `analog_vu_meter_test.dart` are policy violations ‚Äî replace with bounded `tester.pump()` calls.
- Five inline mock/fake class definitions in two files duplicate entries already in `test/mocks/mocks.dart`.
- `AudioRecordingSignalLevel.fromDbfs` is a strong Glados candidate (pure math, monotonicity + clamp invariants).
- `vu_meter_constants.dart` has no test file at all; add a constants-check in `vu_meter_painter_test.dart`.
